RevisionEvent.Note: Only known prior ReleaseDate of the metadata
Added HelioData InformationURL, Updated to SPASE Version 2.7.1. JWL

ResourceHeader.Description: Fort Churchill (FCC) Geophysical Observatory. This site is different from FCHU.
ResourceHeader.Acknowledgement: Please acknowledge: Geological Survey of Canada

InformationURL.Name: THEMIS Fluxgate Ground-based Magnetometer (GMAG) Web Site
InformationURL.Description: THEMIS makes data available from GMAG stations in the United States, Canada, Denmark, Greenland, Norway, Sweden, Iceland, and Russia, and Antarctica.

InformationURL.Name: Canadian Array for Realtime Investigations of Magnetic Activity Homepage
InformationURL.Description: Detailed information about the CARISMA Array.

InformationURL.Name: HelioData
InformationURL.Description: The HelioData mission page provides an overview of the mission and more, such as all SPASE dataset records associated with it.
